# XCTWaiter.Result.completed

**Case**

All of the waiter’s expectations were fulfilled successfully.

## Declaration

```swift
case completed
```

## Result States

- **XCTWaiter.Result.timedOut**: The waiter timed out before all of its expectations were fulfilled.
- **XCTWaiter.Result.incorrectOrder**: The waiter’s expectations were not fulfilled in the required order.
- **XCTWaiter.Result.invertedFulfillment**: An inverted expectation was fulfilled.
- **XCTWaiter.Result.interrupted**: The waiter was interrupted prior to its expectations being fulfilled or timing out.
